creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gian-Simon Purkert from comment #0)

=========================
kern.sched.preempt_thresh
=========================

Apparently not documented at <https://docs.freebsd.org/>: 

% grep -R kern.sched.preempt_thresh /usr/doc
% 

I ceased experimenting with the 224 override around ten months ago <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/543192>. 

I might retry an override – not necessarily 224 — I'm not in a rush. 

Also: <https://forums.ghostbsd.org/viewtopic.php?p=10933#p10933>
